Published

on

By

American billionaire businessman, Elon Musk, has joined millions around the world to criticise Drag Queen’s alleged mockery of Christianity at the opening ceremony of the 2024 Paris Olympic Games.

DAILY POST reports that an attempt by Drag Queen to recreate da Vinci’s painting of Jesus’ Last Supper during the Olympic Games opening ceremony has sparked a worldwide uproar, especially from Christians who labelled it “a blasphemy.”

Commenting under one of the post on X, Musk, who is a self-proclaimed atheist, said it was “extremely disrespectful” to Christians.

He wrote, “This was extremely disrespectful to Christians.”

author: Sunny Green Itodo
description: American billionaire businessman, Elon Musk, has joined millions around the world to criticise Drag Queen's alleged mockery of Christianity at the opening
